note: Curated source list for the ingestion pipeline. Each concept carries factual descriptors and a pair of public-API search queries. The fetch scripts run those queries against the GitHub Search API and OpenAlex; all resulting numbers are real. Edges are curated relationships between concepts. maturityYears is a rough human estimate (years since the technique became established in the field) and is labelled as such.

concepts.label: Laser Frequency Comb
concepts.summary: A phase-stabilised comb of equally spaced optical frequencies that acts as an absolute wavelength ruler for spectrograph calibration, removing reliance on emission-lamp lines.

queries.github: laser frequency comb astronomy spectrograph calibration
queries.openalex: astronomical laser frequency comb spectrograph calibration

concepts.label: Fabry-Perot Etalon
concepts.summary: A passive interferometric calibrator that imprints a dense, stable comb-like set of transmission peaks, used as a lower-cost wavelength reference alongside or in place of a laser comb.

queries.github: fabry perot etalon spectrograph wavelength calibration
queries.openalex: Fabry-Perot etalon spectrograph radial velocity calibration

concepts.label: Fiber Scrambling
concepts.summary: Optical and mechanical techniques that homogenise the near- and far-field light distribution from a fiber feed, suppressing modal-noise and guiding-error signals that masquerade as radial-velocity shifts.

queries.github: optical fiber scrambler spectrograph modal noise
queries.openalex: optical fiber scrambling spectrograph modal noise radial velocity

concepts.label: Thermomechanical Stabilization
concepts.summary: Vacuum enclosure, multi-stage thermal control, and pressure regulation that hold the spectrograph optical bench stable to the level required for sub-metre-per-second velocity precision.

queries.openalex: spectrograph thermal pressure stabilization radial velocity precision

concepts.label: Telluric Correction
concepts.summary: Modelling and removing Earth-atmosphere absorption features from stellar spectra so that contaminated wavelength regions can be recovered for radial-velocity measurement.

queries.openalex: telluric correction stellar spectra radial velocity

concepts.label: Stellar Activity Mitigation
concepts.summary: Statistical and physical techniques that separate apparent velocity signals caused by stellar surface activity (spots, plage, granulation) from genuine planetary reflex motion.

queries.openalex: stellar activity mitigation radial velocity exoplanet

concepts.label: Chromatic RV Index
concepts.summary: A diagnostic that measures the wavelength dependence of a radial-velocity signal; activity-driven signals are typically chromatic while planetary signals are achromatic, giving a discriminator between the two.

queries.openalex: chromatic index radial velocity stellar activity wavelength dependence
